topics.headline: SkinnyDipped and Chunk Nibbles expand retail distribution
topics.summary: SkinnyDipped and Chunk Nibbles snack brands are expanding their nationwide retail presence through new partnerships and rollouts. Both brands are securing broader distribution to reach more consumers across multiple channels.
topics.why_trending: Snack brands are aggressively scaling retail availability as consumer demand for indulgent, premium snacks continues to grow.
titles: SkinnyDipped Expands Retail Footprint with New Partner and More Nationwide Product Rollouts to Follow - Nosh.com
Chunk Nibbles Expands Nationwide at Target Stores, Bringing Indulgent Snack Clusters to More Consumers Than Ever - Nosh.com

topics.headline: Torrid pursues unconventional retail strategies
topics.summary: Torrid is implementing new customer engagement tactics by expanding into post offices and malls. The retailer is diversifying its locations to meet customers in unexpected places.
topics.why_trending: Traditional retailers are experimenting with non-traditional locations and channels to attract customers in a competitive retail environment.
titles: Torrid heads to the post office, mall to woo customers

topics.headline: Tom Brady launches premium coconut water brand
topics.summary: Tom Brady has partnered with delivery platform Gopuff to launch Good Nut, a premium coconut water line available in both original and sparkling varieties. The celebrity-backed beverage brand is entering the competitive functional beverage market.
topics.why_trending: Celebrity entrepreneurs continue investing in health-focused beverages as consumer interest in functional drinks and wellness products remains strong.
titles: Tom Brady Teams With Gopuff to Launch Good Nut Premium Coconut Water - BevNET.com
Original Coconut Water | Good Nut - BevNET.com
Sparkling Coconut Water | Good Nut - BevNET.com

topics.headline: Craft breweries announce partnerships and hiring growth
topics.summary: Regional breweries including Rahr, Lakewood, 3 Sons, and Two Docs are expanding operations through strategic partnerships and active recruitment. The sector shows signs of growth with new brewer and leadership positions opening.
topics.why_trending: Craft brewing industry is experiencing expansion as breweries strengthen partnerships and build teams to meet ongoing market demand.
titles: Rahr Brewing and Lakewood Brewing Announce Partnership - BevNET.com
3 Sons Brewing Co - Brewer - BevNET.com Beverage Industry Job Listing - BevNET.com

topics.headline: Beverage industry accelerates hiring across sales and production
topics.summary: Multiple beverage companies including Eureka Heights, Fremont Brewing, and SpikedAde are actively recruiting for sales representatives, brewers, and management roles. Job postings indicate sector-wide expansion and growth initiatives.
topics.why_trending: Beverage companies are aggressively hiring across sales and production roles, signaling strong market growth and capacity expansion plans.
